# Sanctus Property OPC Pvt Ltd

Sanctus Property OPC Pvt Ltd is a construction and real-estate company based in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India. Founded in 2026 and led by Founder & CEO A. Charles Sandeep, Sanctus Property delivers residential and commercial construction, approved plots, ready-to-move and resale villas, and electrical & plumbing services — all under one roof.

## Services

- Residential Construction — quality-built homes from foundation to finishing detail.
- Commercial Construction — commercial spaces delivered on time and on budget.
- Residential Plots — approved residential plots in and around Coimbatore.
- Commercial Plots — approved commercial plots in and around Coimbatore.
- Ready to Move Villas — fully finished villas with complete documentation.
- Resale Villas — verified resale villas with transparent ownership history and fair market valuation.
- Electrical & Plumbing — professional electrical and plumbing services for residential and commercial projects.

## Service area

Coimbatore and nearby areas of Tamil Nadu, India.

## Contact

- Phone: +91 78458 40069
- Email: sanctuspropertyopc@gmail.com
- Enquiry form: https://sanctusproperty.in/
